mapper.select: select complaint_id as complaintId, student_name as studentName, complaint_type as complaintType, complaint_title as complaintTitle, complaint_content as complaintContent, process_status as processStatus, submit_time as submitTime, handle_time as handleTime, update_time as updateTime from osg_complaint order by submit_time desc, complaint_id desc

select complaint_id as complaintId, student_name as studentName, complaint_type as complaintType, complaint_title as complaintTitle, complaint_content as complaintContent, process_status as processStatus, submit_time as submitTime, handle_time as handleTime, update_time as updateTime from osg_complaint where complaint_id = #{complaintId} limit 1
mapper.update: update osg_complaint set process_status = #{processStatus}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, update_time = now() where complaint_id = #{complaintId}
